subcodes.first_line: O servant of the one true God! When the Morn of divine guidance dawned above the Most Exalted Horizon, its rays brought tidings of great joy
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق صبح هدی چون از افق اعلی طلوع نمود پرتوش بشارت کبری بود و مژده اش
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection of Muhammad, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @literal interpretation
